skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-bitable</name>
    <description>飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-bitable/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-calendar</name>
    <description>飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-calendar/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-channel-rules</name>
    <description>飞书渠道输出规则。所有飞书对话中始终激活。约束 AI 输出格式，防止输出原始卡片 JSON。
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-channel-rules/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-create-doc</name>
    <description>创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-create-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-fetch-doc</name>
    <description>获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 fetch-media 工具）。
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-fetch-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-im-read</name>
    <description>飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-im-read/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-task</name>
    <description>飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-task/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-troubleshoot</name>
    <description>飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-troubleshoot/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-update-doc</name>
    <description>更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/plugins/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-update-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/node-connect/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>tmux</name>
    <description>Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/tmux/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: coze-image-gen
resolvedSkills.description: Create images from text prompts. Use when you need to generate/draw/create images based on descriptions.

resolvedSkills.name: coze-voice-gen
resolvedSkills.description: Text-to-Speech (TTS) and Speech-to-Text (ASR) using coze-coding-dev-sdk. Returns results directly to stdout.

resolvedSkills.name: coze-web-fetch
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch and extract content from URLs using coze-coding-dev-sdk. Supports web pages, PDF, Office documents (doc/docx/ppt/pptx/xls/xlsx/csv), text files, e-books (epub/mobi), XML, and images. Returns structured content with text, images, and links.

resolvedSkills.name: coze-web-search
resolvedSkills.description: Search the web using coze-coding-dev-sdk. Supports web search, image search, AI summaries, time filters, and site restrictions.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书渠道输出规则。所有飞书对话中始终激活。约束 AI 输出格式，防止输出原始卡片 JSON。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 fetch-media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

Use when: (1) sending/receiving Lark messages, (2) managing groups or members, (3) listing department users or contacts, (4) creating calendar events, (5) working with docs/bitable/wiki/OKR/tasks, (6) setting up a new Lark bot, (7) debugging webhook/connection issues, (8) any Lark Open API operation the message tool or MCP doesn't support. Covers both Lark International (open.larksuite.com) and Feishu China (open.feishu.cn).

resolvedSkills.name: ultimate-browser
resolvedSkills.description:
🚀 终极浏览器自动化系统 - 集成所有浏览器能力于一身

核心能力:
1. 智能网页操作 - 点击、填写、提交、截图
2. 网页抓取 - 静态/动态页面内容提取
3. 网站爬虫 - 整站内容批量抓取
4. 验证码解决 - 自动识别和处理各类验证码
5. API 测试 - HTTP/HTTPS 请求测试
6. 页面分析 - 页面结构探索和元素定位
7. 录屏录制 - 自动化操作过程录制

使用场景:
- 自动化表单填写和提交
- 竞品数据采集和监控
- 网站内容批量抓取
- 自动化测试和回归测试
- 价格监控和库存提醒
- 自动化报表下载

skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

resolvedSkills.name: lark-toolkit
resolvedSkills.description: Comprehensive Lark/Feishu API skill for OpenClaw agents. Covers all Lark operations via three access paths: claw-lark plugin (message tool), MCP tools (mcporter), and direct Open API (curl). Use when: (1) sending/receiving Lark messages, (2) managing groups or members, (3) listing department users or contacts, (4) creating calendar events, (5) working with docs/bitable/wiki/OKR/tasks, (6) setting up a new Lark bot, (7) debugging webhook/connection issues, (8) any Lark Open API operation the message tool or MCP doesn't support. Covers both Lark International (open.larksuite.com) and Feishu China (open.feishu.cn).

resolvedSkills.name: ultimate-browser
resolvedSkills.description:
🚀 终极浏览器自动化系统 - 集成所有浏览器能力于一身

核心能力:
1. 智能网页操作 - 点击、填写、提交、截图
2. 网页抓取 - 静态/动态页面内容提取
3. 网站爬虫 - 整站内容批量抓取
4. 验证码解决 - 自动识别和处理各类验证码
5. API 测试 - HTTP/HTTPS 请求测试
6. 页面分析 - 页面结构探索和元素定位
7. 录屏录制 - 自动化操作过程录制

使用场景:
- 自动化表单填写和提交
- 竞品数据采集和监控
- 网站内容批量抓取
- 自动化测试和回归测试
- 价格监控和库存提醒
- 自动化报表下载

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: gh
resolvedSkills.description: Use the GitHub CLI (gh) to perform core GitHub operations: auth status, repo create/clone/fork, issues, pull requests, releases, and basic repo management. Trigger for requests to use gh, manage GitHub repos, PRs, or issues from the CLI.

resolvedSkills.name: lark-toolkit
resolvedSkills.description: Comprehensive Lark/Feishu API skill for OpenClaw agents. Covers all Lark operations via three access paths: claw-lark plugin (message tool), MCP tools (mcporter), and direct Open API (curl). Use when: (1) sending/receiving Lark messages, (2) managing groups or members, (3) listing department users or contacts, (4) creating calendar events, (5) working with docs/bitable/wiki/OKR/tasks, (6) setting up a new Lark bot, (7) debugging webhook/connection issues, (8) any Lark Open API operation the message tool or MCP doesn't support. Covers both Lark International (open.larksuite.com) and Feishu China (open.feishu.cn).

resolvedSkills.name: novel-status
resolvedSkills.description: 查询小说更新和发布状态。当用户说"查询更新"、"更新状态"、"status"、"今日发布"、"可发布章节"时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: page-explorer

resolvedSkills.name: ultimate-browser
resolvedSkills.description:
🚀 终极浏览器自动化系统 - 集成所有浏览器能力于一身

核心能力:
1. 智能网页操作 - 点击、填写、提交、截图
2. 网页抓取 - 静态/动态页面内容提取
3. 网站爬虫 - 整站内容批量抓取
4. 验证码解决 - 自动识别和处理各类验证码
5. API 测试 - HTTP/HTTPS 请求测试
6. 页面分析 - 页面结构探索和元素定位
7. 录屏录制 - 自动化操作过程录制

使用场景:
- 自动化表单填写和提交
- 竞品数据采集和监控
- 网站内容批量抓取
- 自动化测试和回归测试
- 价格监控和库存提醒
- 自动化报表下载

7. 录屏录制 - 自动化操作过程录制

- 自动化表单填写和提交
- 竞品数据采集和监控

- 自动化测试和回归测试
- 价格监控和库存提醒
- 自动化报表下载

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

Covers both Lark International (open.larksuite.com) and Feishu China (open.feishu.cn).

resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书渠道输出规则。所有飞书对话中始终激活。约束 AI 输出格式，防止输出原始卡片 JSON。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 fetch-media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

Covers all Lark operations via three access paths: claw-lark plugin (message tool), MCP tools (mcporter), and direct Open API (curl). Use when: (1) sending/receiving Lark messages, (2) managing groups or members, (3) listing department users or contacts, (4) creating calendar events, (5) working with docs/bitable/wiki/OKR/tasks, (6) setting up a new Lark bot, (7) debugging webhook/connection issues, (8) any Lark Open API operation the message tool or MCP doesn't support. Covers both Lark International (open.larksuite.com) and Feishu China (open.feishu.cn).

resolvedSkills.name: novel-status
resolvedSkills.description: 查询小说更新和发布状态。当用户说"查询更新"、"更新状态"、"status"、"今日发布"、"可发布章节"时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: ultimate-browser
resolvedSkills.description:
🚀 终极浏览器自动化系统 - 集成所有浏览器能力于一身

核心能力:
1. 智能网页操作 - 点击、填写、提交、截图
2. 网页抓取 - 静态/动态页面内容提取
3. 网站爬虫 - 整站内容批量抓取
4. 验证码解决 - 自动识别和处理各类验证码
5. API 测试 - HTTP/HTTPS 请求测试
6. 页面分析 - 页面结构探索和元素定位
7. 录屏录制 - 自动化操作过程录制

使用场景:
- 自动化表单填写和提交
- 竞品数据采集和监控
- 网站内容批量抓取
- 自动化测试和回归测试
- 价格监控和库存提醒
- 自动化报表下载

agent:main:cron:batch-publish-morning:ru.label: Cron: 番茄批量发布-早班

skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-bitable</name>
    <description>飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表

(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格
</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-bitable/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>

resolvedSkills.name: lark-toolkit
resolvedSkills.description: Comprehensive Lark/Feishu API skill for OpenClaw agents. Covers all Lark operations via three access paths: claw-lark plugin (message tool), MCP tools (mcporter), and direct Open API (curl). Use when: (1) sending/receiving Lark messages, (2) managing groups or members, (3) listing department users or contacts, (4) creating calendar events, (5) working with docs/bitable/wiki/OKR/tasks, (6) setting up a new Lark bot, (7) debugging webhook/connection issues, (8) any Lark Open API operation the message tool or MCP doesn't support. Covers both Lark International (open.larksuite.com) and Feishu China (open.feishu.cn).

resolvedSkills.name: ultimate-browser
resolvedSkills.description:
🚀 终极浏览器自动化系统 - 集成所有浏览器能力于一身

核心能力:
1. 智能网页操作 - 点击、填写、提交、截图
2. 网页抓取 - 静态/动态页面内容提取
3. 网站爬虫 - 整站内容批量抓取
4. 验证码解决 - 自动识别和处理各类验证码
5. API 测试 - HTTP/HTTPS 请求测试
6. 页面分析 - 页面结构探索和元素定位
7. 录屏录制 - 自动化操作过程录制

使用场景:
- 自动化表单填写和提交
- 竞品数据采集和监控
- 网站内容批量抓取
- 自动化测试和回归测试
- 价格监控和库存提醒
- 自动化报表下载
